description: Multi-language SDK for the Wildberries marketplace API (Python, Node.js, Go, PHP, Rust), auto-generated from the official OpenAPI specs and kept in sync via GitHub Actions.
rules: This is a unified SDK — Python, Node.js, Go, PHP, and Rust clients expose the same operations derived from the same OpenAPI specs.
When answering code questions, pick the language subdirectory under docs/ that matches the user's stack: docs/python, docs/npm, docs/go, docs/php, docs/rust.

specs/*.yaml are the source of truth (Wildberries API). specs/01-general.yaml covers auth and common primitives; 02-products, 03–07 orders, 08 promotion, 09 communications, 10 tariffs, 11 analytics, 12 reports, 13 finances.
Clients are regenerated on every spec change — do not recommend hand-editing generated code under clients/; point users at the matching spec section instead.
Auth uses bearer tokens from the Wildberries seller portal (see specs/01-general.yaml).
